name: business intake: the profile records criticality availability tolerance and compliance regime
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-intake.sh" --answer workload=ecommerce --answer motivation=revenue --answer criticality=mission-critical --answer availability_tolerance=minutes --answer data_loss_tolerance=minutes --answer data_sensitivity=regulated --answer compliance_regime=hipaa --answer scale=large --answer budget_posture=uptime-first --out p.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const p=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("p.json","utf8"));process.exit(p.answers.criticality==="mission-critical"&&p.answers.availability_tolerance==="minutes"&&p.answers.compliance_regime==="hipaa"?0:1)' && echo recorded 1>&2
